metadata.seed: I am 50 and returning to school because I am out of work. I am, having a very tough time.

automatic_thoughts: I am too old to start over
I won't succeed in school

patient.query: Yeah, it’s kind of overwhelming, honestly. I mean, I feel like everyone else has it all figured out, and here I am, just trying to keep up. Sometimes, I just doubt if I’m good enough to be in this position.

automatic_thoughts: everyone else has it all figured out
I'm just trying to keep up
I'm not good enough for this position

llm_response.response: "I can see that you're feeling quite overwhelmed and doubting yourself right now. It's important to remember that everyone has their own struggles, and it's okay not to have everything figured out all the time."

validate_and_reflect.response: "I can see that you're feeling quite overwhelmed and doubting yourself right now. It's important to remember that everyone has their own struggles, and it's okay not to have everything figured out all the time."

alternative_perspective.response: "It sounds like you're feeling quite overwhelmed and doubting yourself. Have you ever considered what a trusted friend or family member might say about your situation? It could provide a different perspective that helps reduce some of the pressure."

safety_check.response: "I can see that you're feeling quite overwhelmed and doubting yourself. It's important to remember that everyone has their own journey, and it's okay not to have everything figured out all the time."

patient.query: I don’t know, it just feels like too much sometimes. I see others doing amazing things, and I worry I won’t measure up. It makes me question if I really belong here, you know?

I don’t belong here

patient.query: I guess it’s just this constant pressure to perform. I keep thinking about all the expectations, both from myself and from others. When I don’t meet them, it’s like this heavy weight on my chest, and I start feeling really lost.

automatic_thoughts: I must meet all expectations
I am failing if I don't meet them

neutral: Fear of being a burden to others (finding)

llm_response.response: "It sounds like you're under a lot of pressure, and it can feel overwhelming when we don't meet our own or others' expectations. Let's explore together what happens when you don't meet these expectations, and if there might be other ways to approach them."

validate_and_reflect.response: "It sounds like you're under a lot of pressure to meet expectations, both your own and those of others. This can certainly feel overwhelming and cause anxiety. Let's take some time to explore these feelings together."

patient.query: Yeah, it does feel really heavy. When I don’t meet those expectations, I just spiral. I get really down on myself, and it almost feels like I’ve failed everyone, including myself. I guess I just don’t know how to handle that disappointment.

automatic_thoughts: I’ve failed everyone
I don’t know how to handle disappointment
